creator: daniel@morante.net
text:
Created attachment 181222
Port Shell Archive

CGMiner is an open source ASIC/FPGA miner written in C, cross platform for 
Linux, Windows, OS X, (and now FreeBSD), including support and binaries for RPi, OpenWrt routers and others.

Tested build with Poudriere on FreeBSD 11 and 10 (i386 and amd64)
